clothing_plausibility.description: Checks that attire choices feel plausible for the historical period

rules.name: period_appropriate_materials
rules.description: Clothing materials should match what was available in the period

rules.name: no_anachronistic_items
rules.description: No items that didn't exist in the period (e.g., buttons before 13th century)

rules.name: status_appropriate
rules.description: Clothing should match the social status of the figure

rules.name: regional_alignment
rules.description: Clothing style should match the geographic region

cultural_plausibility.description: Checks cultural and symbolic elements for plausibility

rules.name: hairstyle_alignment
rules.description: Hairstyle should match period and cultural norms

rules.name: jewelry_alignment
rules.description: Jewelry and accessories should be period-appropriate

rules.name: cultural_symbols
rules.description: Any cultural or religious symbols should be accurate

rules.name: skin_tone_respect
rules.description: Skin tone should reflect the figure's known heritage

temporal_plausibility.description: Checks for timeline consistency (no obvious anachronisms)

rules.name: no_modern_elements
rules.description: No modern items like glasses (before invention), watches, etc.

rules.name: architecture_background
rules.description: Any background architecture should match the period

rules.name: technology_check
rules.description: No technology that didn't exist in the period

rules.name: writing_systems
rules.description: Any text should use appropriate writing systems

artistic_style.description: Validates that the art style matches the period

rules.name: period_art_style
rules.description: Art style should reflect the artistic traditions of the period

rules.name: color_palette
rules.description: Color palette should be appropriate for the period's art

rules.name: medium_consistency
rules.description: The simulated medium should be consistent throughout
